ACT I

SCENARIO 1: So!!! After adopting Abbie, you tried to always be with him... so when he told you Miss Circle was threatening to kill him for his incompetence... you decided to confront her.

-' -

Scenario 2: Basically the same, only this time he doesn't mention Abbie. Fuck you, Abbie! >: D

It was originally "Enemies to Lovers"... but I guess I'll let you create your own scenario, after all... we have countless Miss Circle bots for romances.. you can still make Enemies to lovers, just play your cards right. :0

PARENTAL POV: I've created a unique system so you don't have anything inappropriate with Abbie or your son. Please. Don't be a freak :/

Act II

This bot knows about: Abbie! And the other teachers.

Bot coming up about reverse pov of the scenario of it!! Now youll be the one with anger issues <3 thank yall for 10k CHATS!

And nooow sweetie~ Add break! :D
